Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lemon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Lemon is a pale, bald, human woman with a yellow lemon cross-section tattoo on her skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Lemon is in a relationship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — Lemon is an individual mentioned by Omega.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Lemon is a short human woman with a lemon tattoo on her bald head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Lemon is working to rebuild the Advocates.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Lemon is a woman who has many stories from her life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Lemon was cursed by the Aether to live an interesting life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Lemon's brain was reinforced by an Aethril Progenitor to be immune to Subspace madness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Lemon is a reincarnated star-dragon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
